meta.title: Lo jòc de mots quotidian
meta.description: Devinhatz lo mot amagat en 6 ensages (o mens). Un novèl enigma es disponible cada jorn!
meta.keywords: occitan, enigma, mot, jòc, en linha, devinhar, quotidian

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Occitan. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Occitan as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in Occitan. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in Occitan. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in Occitan. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

octordle.title: Octordle — 8 boards at once
octordle.description: Play Octordle in Occitan. Solve 8 Wordle boards at once with 13 guesses.

sedecordle.title: Sedecordle — 16 boards at once
sedecordle.description: Play Sedecordle in Occitan. Solve 16 Wordle boards at once with 21 guesses.

duotrigordle.title: Duotrigordle — 32 boards at once
duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in Occitan. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

text.no_attempts: You haven't tried any words yet!
text.share_challenge_win: Ai resòlfo lo Wordle del jorn en {n} ensages. Pòdes far mièlhs?
text.share_challenge_lose: Ai pas pogut resòlvre lo Wordle del jorn. E tu?
text.hard_mode_position: Mòde dificil: {letter} deu èsser en posicion {position}

help.title: How to Play
help.text_1_2: Each guess must be a valid five letter word. Press the enter button to submit your guess.
help.text_1_3: After you guess, the tiles will change color to indicate which letters of your word are correct or almost correct.
help.text_2_1: is in the word and in the correct location!
help.text_2_2: is in the word, but not in the correct location.
help.text_2_3: is not present in the word you are trying to guess.
help.text_3: A new word will be available each day!
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.

ui.word_info_desc: Definicion e art IA aprèp lo jòc
ui.install_app_desc: Jogar fòra linha e obténer l'icòna
ui.play_more_languages: Jogatz mai de lengas per veire vòstras estadisticas globalas!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Jogar Wordle cada jorn coma una aplicacion
ui.no_games_yet: Avètz pas encara jogat. Causissètz una lenga per començar!
ui.easy_desc: Tot mot acceptat, quitament s'es pas dins lo diccionari
ui.normal_desc: Los ensages devon èsser de mots valids del diccionari
ui.hard_desc: Las indicacions reveladas devon èsser utilizadas als ensages seguents
ui.todays_word_reveal: Lo mot d'uèi — Jogatz per lo revelar!
ui.future_word: Aqueste mot es pas encara estat jogat. Tornatz mai tard!
ui.daily_words_counting: mots quotidians e de mai en mai
ui.difficulty_locked: La dificultat se pòt pas cambiar aprèp aver ensajat
ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
